from fastapi import FastAPI, Depends
import httpx

app = FastAPI()

def get_payment_client():
    return httpx.Client(base_url="https://api.payments.example.com", timeout=10)

@app.post("/charge")
async def create_charge(amount: float, client: httpx.Client = Depends(get_payment_client)):
    response = client.post("/charges", json={"amount": amount})
    return response.json()
